<!-- Thanks for contributing to agents-999! -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (agent capability / provider / UI)
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets (API keys/tokens) committed
- [ ] If adding a provider: touched all five places per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If editing agents: changed the source/overrides, **not** the generated `lib/agents/data.ts`
